text:
Hello Felippe!

Friday, April 4, 2008, 8:35:12 AM, you wrote:

> Running this patch on my tinderbox, I did have an problem, please see
> the log below, try to fix and re-send us an new patch.
> http://tb3.droso.net/errors/7-lippe/linux-xerces-c2-2.7.0_1.log
 Hm, it's very strange. SRC_DISTFILES= is empty? Here is my log: http://www.logvinov.com/files/linux-xerces-c2-2.7.0_1.log

Best regards,
 Alexander                            mailto:ports@logvinov.com
